items.title: Why It May Be Useful to Integrate the Stereotype Content Model and the Interpersonal Perspective
items.author: Jenny M. Cundiff, Timothy W. Smith, Adrian C. Williams
items.content: <article>Perspectives on Psychological Science, Ahead of Print. This article synthesizes how we think about groups and how we behave during interpersonal situations by integrating the influential stereotype content model from social psychology and the interpersonal perspective in personality and clinical psychology. ...</article>
